title: Ro-Tel Hormel Chili Cheese Dip
ingredients: 1 10oz can Ro-Tel tomatoes and diced green chiles
instructions:
Cut the cheese into cubes and melt in a double boiler over low heat while stirring.
Stir in the Ro-Tel tomatoes and the chili. Serve with your favorite chips.
Crockpot works well with this recipe.
